definition.description: Initial or controlled report definition JSON.

availableSubReports.description: Sub-reports the designer can reference. Include parameters array for auto-discovery.

layoutState.description: Controlled panel layout state for persistence.

panelConfig.description: Per-panel move/close overrides (toolbox, datasource, properties, styles, console, parameters).

onSaveTemplate.description: Called when user saves a template.

onDeleteTemplate.description: Called when user deletes a template.

onLoadTemplate.description: Called when user loads a template.

tabs.description: Array of tabs when multi-tab is enabled.

onTabClose.description: Called when a tab is closed.

definition.description: The report definition JSON to render.

datasourcePlugins.description: Plugins used to fetch datasource data.

onParameterChange.description: Fires when end-user changes parameter values.

parameterPanel.description: Parameter panel display mode and position.

subReportDefinitions.description: Available sub-report definitions for recursive rendering.

onColumnResize.description: Fires when user resizes a table column.

onColumnReorder.description: Fires when user reorders table columns via drag.

onDrillThrough.description: Fires when user clicks a table row or chart element for drill-through.

onCellEdit.description: Fires when user edits a table cell (double-click to edit).

syncParamsToHash.description: Sync parameter values to URL hash for bookmarkable state.

hideToolbar.description: Hide the built-in toolbar. Use with viewerRef to provide your own controls.

viewerRef.description: Ref to access viewer actions (exportPdf, print, refresh) from external buttons.
